name: OPEC IDLE
short_description: Become an oil magnate in a few days! Without investing real money, you'll get real pleasure from the profits! From pipette of oil to sales of trains to the Kingdom of Esvatini!
detailed_description:
Wishlist Epic Auto Towers, a game from our son, a professional game developer!


About the Game

Opec Idle is an incremental game with intuitive gameplay, without in-game purchases.
The minimalistic graphics of the game will not catch anyone's eye on your working computer :)

Game Features


  • Pump the oil with a hand pump and sell it with existing containers.
  • Buy new containers.
  • Develop the field by buying automatic pumps.
  • Hire smart sellers.
  • Buy artifacts for them.
  • Purchase potions to increase pump efficiency.
  • Sign contracts to supply your oil to distant countries.
  • Don't be afraid to start over! Each restart gives significant bonus skills in the game.
